full_text:
Qin Yilu 秦宜祿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Yilu (秦宜祿)was born in Yunzhong. Sent to ask for reinforcements, his wife was taken by Cao Cao. Killed by Zhang Fei. Qin Yilu was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom. Qin Yilu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
